generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor providing output torque (τ_M) based on input current (I_M) for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot."
]

instance GearWheelTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component transforming torque (τ_G) and angular velocity between motor and cycloidal gearbox in the first axis."
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox transforming torque (τ_G → τ_out) and angular velocity for the first axis output."
]

instance SINUMERIK840DslController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller managing position/speed/acceleration inputs for the first axis."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Primary position encoder directly mounted on the permanent magnet synchronous motor measuring angular position (r_M)."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder located behind the gearbox measuring output angular position (r_out) for elasticity/friction analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current (I_M) to derive motor torque (τ_M) via manufacturer-provided parameters."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
    base:desc "Time-series data of motor angular position (r_M) streamed via MQTT protocol."
]

instance SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryPositionEncoder
    base:desc "Time-series data of output angular position (r_out) streamed via MQTT protocol."
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
    base:desc "Time-series data of input current (I_M) streamed via MQTT protocol."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram (bdd) representing structural model of the first axis with components (Motor, Gearbox) and rotational/current flows."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLToolEnabler
]

instance SysMLInternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram (ibd) showing instance-level connections: FirstAxis → Motor → Gearwheel → CycloidalGearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLToolEnabler
]

instance FrictionlessGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink frictionless gearbox model (Fig. 4a) serving as baseline for friction compensation analysis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Coulomb-Viscous friction model subtracted from ideal behavior for first axis friction characterization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Stribeck friction model accounting for lubrication effects in the gear transmission."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Dahl friction model capturing pre-sliding displacement effects in the gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink LuGre friction model for complex dynamic friction behavior in the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MotorDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink motor dynamics model converting input current (I_M) to output torque (τ_M) using manufacturer parameters."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulationMotor : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model (Simulation_M) processing raw motor data to compute derived torque (τr_M) and angular velocity."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulationGearWheel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model (Simulation_GW) processing gearwheel data to compute derived torque (τr_G)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulationCycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model (Simulation_GB) processing gearbox data to compute derived output torque (τr_out)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series array of measured input current (I_M) from MotorCurrentSensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series array of measured motor angular position (r_M) from MotorPositionEncoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredOutputPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series array of measured output angular position (r_out) from SecondaryPositionEncoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived time-series of simulated motor torque (τr_M) computed by SimulationMotor model."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance SimulatedGearWheelTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived time-series of simulated gearwheel torque (τr_G) computed by SimulationGearWheel model."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived time-series of simulated output torque (τr_out) computed by SimulationCycloidalGearbox model."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredOutputPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol enabling real-time bidirectional streaming of sensor data (I_M, r_M, r_out) from physical system to digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, ModelValidationService, VisualizationService
]

instance SysMLToolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tooling for creating structural (bdd) and behavioral (ibd) models of the first axis components."
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink environment for executing friction models and simulation components (Simulation_M, Simulation_GW, Simulation_GB)."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, ModelValidationService, DynamicModelExchangeService
]

instance DigitalShadowReferenceModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM) providing traceability via associations (DataTrace → Processing → Model)."
    DTDFVocab:enables TraceabilityService
]

instance FrictionAnalysisEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processing pipeline comparing simulated vs. measured data (τr_out vs. r_out) to identify friction losses."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, AnomalyDetectionService
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time service comparing simulated (τr_out) vs. measured (r_out) data to detect static/kinetic/viscous friction losses."
    DTDFVocab:provides StaticFrictionInsight, KineticFrictionInsight, ViscousFrictionInsight
]

instance ModelValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service cross-checking white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre)."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelAccuracyInsight, ModelSelectionRecommendationAction
]

instance DynamicModelExchangeService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling runtime switching between friction models (e.g., Coulomb-Viscous → LuGre) based on dynamic conditions."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalModelInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard displaying data traces, simulation outputs, and deviation analysis (Fig. 4 in paper)."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizedDataInsight
]

instance TraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service maintaining full lineage of data points via DSRM associations (DataTrace → Processing → Model)."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataProvenanceInsight
]

instance AnomalyDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service flagging discrepancies between simulated and measured data (e.g., sudden friction spikes due to wear)."
    DTDFVocab:provides AnomalyAlertAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance StaticFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified static friction parameters (τ_s) for the first axis based on torque discrepancies."
]

instance KineticFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified kinetic friction parameters (τ_k) for the first axis based on velocity-dependent torque losses."
]

instance ViscousFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified viscous friction parameters (b) for the first axis based on velocity-proportional torque losses."
]

instance ModelAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantitative comparison of model accuracy between analytical (white-box) and data-driven (black-box) friction models."
]

instance ModelSelectionRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Recommendation for optimal friction model (e.g., LuGre for complex dynamics vs. Coulomb-Viscous for simplicity)."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance OptimalModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of optimal friction model based on current operating conditions (e.g., low-speed vs. high-speed regimes)."
]

instance VisualizedDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Unified visualization of data traces, simulation outputs, and deviation analysis for operator interpretation."
]

instance DataProvenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Full traceability of data points from physical sensors through processing to simulation models via DSRM."
]

instance AnomalyAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic alert triggered when discrepancies exceed predefined thresholds (e.g., sudden friction spikes)."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual intervention to update CNC parameters (e.g., torque compensation) based on friction characterization insights."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C1: Environment
instance FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearWheelTransmission, CycloidalGearbox, SINUMERIK840DslController,
                 MotorPositionEncoder, SecondaryPositionEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor
]

// C5: Components
instance FirstAxisComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural representation of the first axis including motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox, and CNC controller."
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearWheelTransmission, CycloidalGearbox, SINUMERIK840DslController
]

instance FrictionModelLibrary : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Collection of friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) implemented in Simulink for dynamic exchange."
    base:contains CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
]

instance SimulationPipeline : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular simulation pipeline processing raw sensor data through Simulation_M, Simulation_GW, and Simulation_GB."
    base:contains SimulationMotor, SimulationGearWheel, SimulationCycloidalGearbox
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is **passive** (no direct feedback to PT). However, insights (e.g., friction model parameters) can be **manually integrated** into the **SINUMERIK 840D sl** controller for improved motion accuracy. No automated closed-loop interaction exists in this use case."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital shadow operates in **real-time** with:
  - **Live data ingestion**: Sensor data streamed via MQTT at the robot’s operational frequency (not explicitly quantified but assumed to match CNC control loop rates).
  - **Dynamic model updates**: Friction models are **continuously recalibrated** during operation to account for wear, tool changes, or environmental factors (e.g., temperature).
  - **Synchronization**: Simulated data (**ˆr_M**, **ˆr_G**, **ˆr_out**) is generated **on-demand** or in parallel with measurements for comparison."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration follows the **DSRM** with:
  - **Purpose-driven design**: Focused on **friction derivation** for the first axis.
  - **Processing pipeline**:
    1. **Data ingestion** (MQTT → **DataTrace**).
    2. **Model execution** (Simulink → **Simulation_M/GW/GB**).
    3. **Comparison** (measured vs. simulated data).
    4. **Visualization** (dashboard).
  - **No autonomous feedback**: Passive digital shadow (no virtual-to-physical actuation)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the **as-operated** phase with:
  - **Real-time monitoring**: Active during robot operation (e.g., machining).
  - **Adaptive modeling**: Supports **continuous friction model refinement** (e.g., via **white-box/black-box hybrid approaches**).
  - **No design/manufacturing phases**: Focuses on **operational inaccuracies** (e.g., 30% error due to friction) rather than idealized models."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validity mechanisms include:
  - **Deviation analysis**: Comparison of **simulated (ˆr_out)** vs. **measured (r_out)** data to quantify friction errors.
  - **Model hybridization**: Combines **white-box** (analytical, parameterized) and **black-box** (data-driven) models for robustness.
  - **Uncertainty sources**:
    - **Sensor noise**: Encoder/current sensor inaccuracies.
    - **Model approximations**: Simplified dynamics models (e.g., no separate gearbox simulation).
    - **Environmental factors**: Temperature, wear, tool changes (addressed via continuous recalibration).
  - **Verification**: Cross-validation of multiple friction models (e.g., Stribeck vs. Dahl) against measured data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections include:
  - **Protocol**: **MQTT** for real-time sensor data streaming from the **SINUMERIK 840D sl** CNC to the digital shadow.
  - **Data format**: Time-series arrays of **torque (τ)**, **angular velocity (ω)**, and **current (I_M)**.
  - **Network architecture**: Implicitly **client-server** (robot as client, digital shadow as server for data processing).
  - **No explicit API documentation**: Assumed integration via standard industrial protocols (e.g., OPC UA not mentioned but plausible for CNC systems)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployment details are **not explicitly specified** but inferred as:
  - **Local/edge computing**: Likely co-located with the robot for low-latency processing (MQTT streaming implies minimal network delay).
  - **Software stack**:
    - **Simulation**: MathWorks Simulink (executable models).
    - **Data processing**: Custom processing components (e.g., Python/Java for DSRM compliance).
    - **Visualization**: Dashboard (technology unspecified but likely web-based or MATLAB-based)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adheres to:
  - **Modeling**: **SysML** (ISO 19505) for system architecture.
  - **Simulation**: **MathWorks Simulink** (de facto standard for control systems).
  - **Digital Shadow framework**: **DSRM** (reference model from [15], [38]) for traceability.
  - **Industrial protocols**: **MQTT** (OASIS standard) for data streaming.
  - **No explicit mention of**: OPC UA, IEC 62264, or Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards (though AAS is referenced in the abstract)."
]
